summary: Successfully committed and pushed overlay mode implementation and bug fixes. Major features: Overlay mode (200x200 minimal window, transparent, always-on-top, frameless), ErrorBoundary for crash recovery, error handling in store operations, recreateWindow function for mode switching. Bug fixes: blank window after API key save (preload path fix), SettingsPanel race condition, renderer crash handler. Pushed to master as commit 043e7fc.
current_status: All changes committed and pushed - Application running
bugs_fixed: Blank window after API key save - preload path was index.js instead of index.cjs
SettingsPanel race condition between save and fetch
No error handling in store operations
No crash recovery for renderer failures
